1: -module(iguana_meta_guard_SUITE).
    2: -include_lib("common_test/include/ct.hrl").
    3: -include("iguana.hrl").
    4: 
    5: -export([all/0, init_per_suite/1, end_per_suite/1, init_per_testcase/2, end_per_testcase/2]).
    6: -export([test_initial_state/1, test_domain_shift/1, test_unknown_domain/1, test_swarm_broadcast/1]).
    7: 
    8: all() ->
    9:     [test_initial_state, test_domain_shift, test_unknown_domain, test_swarm_broadcast].
   10: 
   11: init_per_suite(Config) ->
   12:     _ = application:start(pg),
   13:     Config.
   14: 
   15: end_per_suite(_Config) ->
   16:     ok.
   17: 
   18: end_per_testcase(_Case, _Config) ->
   19:     [gen_server:stop(W) || W <- pg:get_members(iguana_swarm)],
   20:     case whereis(iguana_meta_guard) of
   21:         undefined -> ok;
   22:         Pid -> 
   23:             gen_server:stop(Pid),
   24:             timer:sleep(50)
   25:     end,
   26:     ok.
   27: 
   28: init_per_testcase(_Case, Config) ->
   29:     case iguana_meta_guard:start_link() of
   30:         {ok, _} -> ok;
   31:         {error, {already_started, _}} -> ok
   32:     end,
   33:     Config.
   34: 
   35: test_initial_state(_Config) ->
   36:     default = iguana_meta_guard:get_current_domain().
   37: 
   38: test_domain_shift(_Config) ->
   39:     {ok, GuardPid} = iguana_entropy_guard:start_link(),
   40:     timer:sleep(50), %% Sync delay
   41:     
   42:     iguana_meta_guard:set_domain(medical),
   43:     %% Cast is asynchronous, wait a bit for processing
   44:     timer:sleep(100),
   45:     medical = iguana_meta_guard:get_current_domain(),
   46:     
   47:     %% Verify the guard received the threshold (medical => 1.8)
   48:     {ok, State} = iguana_entropy_guard:get_stats(GuardPid),
   49:     1.8 = State#state.entropy_threshold,
   50:     
   51:     gen_server:stop(GuardPid).
   52: 
   53: test_unknown_domain(_Config) ->
   54:     OldDomain = iguana_meta_guard:get_current_domain(),
   55:     iguana_meta_guard:set_domain(non_existent_domain),
   56:     timer:sleep(100),
   57:     %% Should keep the old domain
   58:     OldDomain = iguana_meta_guard:get_current_domain().
   59: 
   60: test_swarm_broadcast(_Config) ->
   61:     {ok, G1} = iguana_entropy_guard:start_link(),
   62:     {ok, G2} = iguana_entropy_guard:start_link(),
   63:     timer:sleep(50), %% Sync delay
   64:     
   65:     iguana_meta_guard:set_domain(finance),
   66:     timer:sleep(100),
   67:     
   68:     {ok, S1} = iguana_entropy_guard:get_stats(G1),
   69:     {ok, S2} = iguana_entropy_guard:get_stats(G2),
   70:     
   71:     %% finance => 2.0
   72:     2.0 = S1#state.entropy_threshold,
   73:     2.0 = S2#state.entropy_threshold,
   74:     
   75:     gen_server:stop(G1),
   76:     gen_server:stop(G2).
